message:
Add multi-fragment dataset support with parallel fetching

- Add RemoteLanceDataset class for full dataset access
- Load manifest to discover all fragments (20 files, 1M rows)
- Execute queries across fragments in parallel using Promise.all()
- Parse fragment info from manifest protobuf
- Update demo to auto-detect dataset vs single file URLs
- Show total row count (1,000,000) instead of "Lazy"
